summary: ANDROID | FMD - When app open for first time dialog for 'Data collection' is constantly appearing after clicking on device card
scenario: Data Collection dialog reappears repeatedly when tapping device card on FMD screen after denying location permission during onboarding
description_clean: When the app is opened for the first time with a device connected, during onboarding if "Don't Allow" is selected for location, the "Data Collection" dialog keeps reappearing after clicking on the device card on the FMD screen. Dismissing the second dialog by clicking outside it and then clicking the device card causes the dialog to pop up constantly instead of showing the device card. Re-entering the FMD settings and clicking the device card again works correctly.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time with a Bluetooth audio device already connected.
2. During the onboarding flow, when prompted for Location permission, select "Don't Allow".
3. After onboarding completes, observe the Home screen (FMD - Find My Device screen).
4. Tap on the device card displayed on the Home screen.
5. Observe that a "Data Collection" dialog appears.
6. Dismiss the "Data Collection" dialog by tapping outside of it (e.g., on the background).
7. Tap on the device card again.
8. Observe that the "Data Collection" dialog reappears instead of navigating to the Device Settings screen.
9. Dismiss the dialog again by tapping outside it.
10. Tap on the device card repeatedly and observe that the dialog keeps popping up constantly.
11. Navigate back to the Home screen (FMD) and re-enter the settings.
12. Tap on the device card again.
expected: After onboarding with Location permission denied, tapping the device card should navigate to the Device Settings screen for the connected device. The "Data Collection" dialog should appear only once, if at all.
actual: The "Data Collection" dialog reappears every time the device card is tapped after dismissing it by tapping outside. The dialog pops up constantly instead of showing the device card screen. Only after re-entering FMD settings and tapping the device card again does it work correctly.
